decisions: Task is CLOSED only after accepted evidence entered origin/main via PR #201 and CI passed.
M7 UI/localization exit is prerequisite evidence only and is not M7 Gate PASS, formal content lock approval, release readiness, production art/culture approval, or manual human acceptance.
